debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let f : ℕ → ℕ := fun n ↦ n.rec 3 (λ _ x ↦ (x - 2) * (2 ^ x - 3).totient + 2)
  have hf : ∀ n, 3 ≤ f n := by
    intro n; induction' n with n ih
    · rfl
    · dsimp; have h1 : 5 ≤ 2 ^ f n - 3 := by
        have : 2 ^ 3 - 3 ≤ 2 ^ f n - 3 := Nat.sub_le_sub_right (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) ih) 3
        exact this
      have h2 : 1 < (2 ^ f n - 3).totient := Nat.one_lt_totient (by linarith) (by linarith)
      linarith
  have hf_mono : StrictMono f := by
    intro n m h; induction' h with m _ ih
    · dsimp; have h1 : 5 ≤ 2 ^ f n - 3 := by
        have : 2 ^ 3 - 3 ≤ 2 ^ f n - 3 := Nat.sub_le_sub_right (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) (hf n)) 3
        exact this
      have h2 : 1 < (2 ^ f n - 3).totient := Nat.one_lt_totient (by linarith) (by linarith)
      linarith
    · linarith
  have hf_dvd : ∀ {i j}, i < j → (2 ^ f i - 3).totient ∣ f j - 2 := by
    intro i j h; induction' h with j _ ih
    · dsimp; exact Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _
    · dsimp; exact Nat.dvd_trans ih (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
  use Set.range (fun n ↦ ⟨f n, by linarith [hf n]⟩)
  constructor
  · exact Set.range_infinite fun n m h ↦ hf_mono.injective (PNat.ext_iff.1 h)
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]
    intro i j hij
    wlog h : i < j
    · exact (this j i hij.symm (hij.lt_or_lt.resolve_left h)).symm
    · have h_odd : (2 ^ f i - 3) % 2 = 1 := by
        rw [Nat.sub_mod, Nat.pow_mod]
        norm_num; linarith [hf i]
      have h_pow : 2 ^ (f j - 2) % (2 ^ f i - 3) = 1 := by
        have := Nat.pow_mod_totient (Nat.Coprime.symm (Nat.coprime_odd_left.2 h_odd))
        rw [Nat.pow_mul_mod, this]; simp
        exact hf_dvd h
      apply Nat.Coprime.symm; rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one, Nat.gcd_rec]
      have : 2 ^ f j - 3 = 2 ^ (f j - 2) * 4 - 3 := by
        rw [← Nat.pow_add]; congr; linarith [hf j]
      rw [this, Nat.add_sub_assoc (by norm_num), Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod, h_pow]
      norm_num; rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]; exact (by linarith)
